author: Mp1e
content: Completed: Removed NS_ERROR_NET_TIMEOUT and NS_ERROR_DNS_RESOLVE_UNKNOWN_HOST from DNS_ERROR_STRINGS. NS_ERROR_NET_TIMEOUT is a generic network timeout (false positive for DNS). NS_ERROR_DNS_RESOLVE_UNKNOWN_HOST doesn't exist in Firefox. Only NS_ERROR_UNKNOWN_HOST remains. Added explanatory comment. Research saved to knowledge page firefox-dns-errors.
